title: Laundry Supervisor
description:
Shangri-La Rasa Sentosa, Singapore

We are looking for a Laundry Supervisor to join our team!

As a Laundry Supervisor, we rely on you to:

  • Ensure smooth daily running of the houseleeping laundry section.
  • Support the managers in maintaining hotel's standard operating procedure.
  • Supervise the team performance and oversee the workflow
  • Maintains the quality and adequate supply of uniform and linens
  • Ensure timely ordering of inventory before reaching par level
  • Oversee the accuracy of the inventories and related documentation, including inventory sheet record and uniform issuance
  • Ensure any loss or damage to the uniforms, linens and equiqment is promptly reported

We are looking for someone who:

  • Is knowledgeable in laundry and uniform room operations
  • Is able to manage linen and inventory loss/ damage effectively
  • Is familar with the various chemicals used for washing
  • Has experience in hotel linen cleaning procedure and processes
  • Preferably has relevant experiences with hotel's laundry operations

We Offer

  • 5-day work week
  • Learning and Development opportunities for career development
  • Medical and insurance coverage
  • Special employee discount within Shangri-La Group
  • Duty Meals and shuttle bus provided

If you are the right person, what are you waiting for? Click the apply button now!

postedCompany.description:
Shangri-La Rasa Sentosa, Singapore

At Shangri-La Group we are a heart-warming family. We share something powerful – our genuine care and respect for others. Our strength lies beyond our harmonious surroundings and hideaway locations. It lies in our core values that guide us to treat each and everyone with honour, as kin, as family. We strive to be the preferred employer by providing great benefits, tranquil and sincere working environment, work-life balance and effort recognitions.

Just 15 minutes from the city, Shangri-La Rasa Sentosa, Singapore is the country’s only beachfront resort, offering 454 guest rooms and suites, each with a private balcony or terrace boasting views of the sea or lush greenery. The resort delivers exceptional service, creating the ideal island retreat for guests to unwind and enjoy a range of experiences, including sea sports on the private beach, fun-filled activities for all ages, indulgent spa treatments, and delightful beachside dining.
postedCompany.name: SENTOSA BEACH RESORT PTE LTD
